tasks.description: Measure and validate the lspci caching logic in neos-driver-manager.
Ensure dependency validations in neos-autoupdate.sh rely on native bash capabilities. Consider native bash integer math for disk space comparisons.
Consider testing QML rendering speed with the #0078D4 background vs an image.
Validate that input sanitization and option termination rely on native bash syntax and do not incur additional execution overhead.
Ensure the early dependency validation for snapper relies on lightweight native bash capabilities to eliminate fork/exec overhead.
Documentation update only; no performance optimizations required here.
No performance optimizations required for documentation tracking updates.
Nudge (minor authorized performance optimization on a target file).
Perform a minor authorized performance optimization on a target file (nudge) as fallback.
Replaced native Bash conditional with arithmetic evaluation for purely numeric data.
Minor nudge optimization applied to tests/verify_airootfs_structure.sh: replaced POSIX single brackets [ ] with native Bash double brackets [[ ]] for conditional statements.
Minor nudge optimization applied to tests/verify_build_profile.sh: replaced POSIX single brackets [ ] with native Bash double brackets [[ ]] for conditional statements.
Minor nudge optimization applied to tests/verify_ufw.sh: replaced POSIX single brackets [ ] with native Bash double brackets [[ ]] for conditional statements.
Minor nudge optimization applied to tests/verify_iso_smoketest.sh: replaced $(basename "$file") with native Bash parameter expansion ${file##*/} to eliminate subprocess overhead.
Minor nudge optimization applied to tests/verify_performance_config.sh: replaced POSIX single brackets [ ] with native Bash double brackets [[ ]] for conditional statements.
Minor nudge optimization applied to tests/verify_autoupdate_security.sh: replaced POSIX single brackets [ ] with native Bash double brackets [[ ]] for conditional statements.
Minor nudge optimization applied to tests/verify_unpackfs_exclude.sh: replaced POSIX single brackets [ ] with native Bash double brackets [[ ]] and arithmetic evaluation (( )) for conditionals.
Review if an exponential backoff strategy is needed for performance
Evaluate if enabling swap-to-file by default would improve system responsiveness on low-RAM devices without sacrificing Btrfs performance.
